zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud D'Eiville於大約1251年出生在英國史洛普爾艾勒斯莫時，她的父親Roger d'Eiville de Tabley27歲，母親Mrs Roger D'Eivill28歲。她於1282年之前與John le Strange V 1st Baron Strange of Knokyn結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1325年7月在英國史洛普爾可諾金 在 奧斯維斯崔享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud D'Eiville于大约1251年出生在英国史洛普爾艾勒斯莫时，她的父亲Roger d'Eiville de Tabley27岁，母亲Mrs Roger D'Eivill28岁。她于1282年之前与John le Strange V 1st Baron Strange of Knokyn结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1325年7月在英国史洛普爾可諾金 在 奧斯維斯崔享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: D'Eiville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Déville in Seine-Maritime.

nickname from Middle English devel ‘devil’ (Old English dēofol). This may have been acquired as a pageant name or as a shortened form of a longer nickname such as that of Robert and William Drepedevel (‘kill the devil’), recorded in the 1301 Subsidy Rolls (Sutton Howgrave, in Kirklington, North Yorkshire).

variants.name: Dewell
meanings: variant of Deaville , a nickname from Middle English devel (Old English dēofol) ‘devil, Satan’, possibly acquired as a pageant name or as a shortened form of a longer nickname. Compare Devall and Deeble .

of Breton origin, a variant of Joel from the Old Breton personal name Iudhael. The personal name was seemingly reintroduced into Britain from France in the 17th century by Huguenots, and was common in Devon and Cornwall and the Breton districts of Yorkshire and the eastern counties.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud D'Eiville was born about 1251, in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England, her father, Roger d'Eiville de Tabley, was 27 and her mother, Mrs Roger D'Eivill, was 28. She married John le Strange V 1st Baron Strange of Knokyn before 1282. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died about July 1325, in Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud D'Eiville est née environ 1251, à Ellesmere, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger d'Eiville de Tabley, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs Roger D'Eivill, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John le Strange V 1st Baron Strange of Knokyn avant 1282. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ juillet 1325, à Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud D'Eiville um 1251 in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger d'Eiville de Tabley 27 und ihre Mutter Mrs Roger D'Eivill 28. Sie hat vor 1282 John le Strange V 1st Baron Strange of Knokyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um Juli 1325 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud D'Eiville è nata il circa 1251 nel Ellesmere, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Roger d'Eiville de Tabley, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Mrs Roger D'Eivill, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato John le Strange V 1st Baron Strange of Knokyn prima del 1282. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa luglio 1325, nel Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud D'Eivilleが約1251年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアエレスメアで生まれた時，父Roger d'Eiville de Tableyは27歳，母Mrs Roger D'Eivillは28歳であった。1282年以前にJohn le Strange V 1st Baron Strange of Knokynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1325年7月にイギリスシュロプシュアイアノクイン イン オスウエストリーで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud D'Eiville(이)가 대략 1251년 영국 슈럽실르 엘레스머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger d'Eiville de Tabley(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Roger D'Eivill(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1282년 이전 John le Strange V 1st Baron Strange of Knokyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1325년 7월 영국 슈럽실르 노킨 인 오스w스트리에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud D'Eiville nasceu aproximadamente 1251, em Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger d'Eiville de Tabley, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Roger D'Eivill, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com John le Strange V 1st Baron Strange of Knokyn antes 1282. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente julho de 1325, em Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud D'Eiville родилась около 1251 г. в местности эллесмир, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger d'Eiville de Tabley было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Roger D'Eivill, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John le Strange V 1st Baron Strange of Knokyn перед 1282 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около июль 1325 г. в местности ноккин ин освестри, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.

sm.about 1251–about July 1325: e tusa o le 1251–e tusa o le Iulai 1325

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud D'Eiville nació aproximadamente 1251, en Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger d'Eiville de Tabley, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs Roger D'Eivill, tenía 28 años. Se casó con John le Strange V 1st Baron Strange of Knokyn antes de 1282. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente julio de 1325, en Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años.
